symptom_vector: service-to-service gRPC connection failures and extreme latency spikes, indicating potential network packet corruption or bit errors leading to data corruption

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: recommendationservice 与 productcatalogservice 之间的网络存在包损坏（packet corruption）或比特错误（bit errors），导致 rrt 和 rrt_max 等指标极端飙升，gRPC 连接超时并返回 StatusCode.UNAVAILABLE 错误
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到 recommendationservice-1 的 rrt_max 指标从 12,499.0 飙升至 39,660,312.36，rrt 从 3,902.74 升至 6,725,340.28，表明出现极端网络延迟
Step 2: 分析 recommendationservice-1 的日志，发现大量‘failed to connect to all addresses’、‘Connection timed out’ 和 ‘StatusCode.UNAVAILABLE’ 错误，证明网络连接层面存在严重问题

Step 3: 通过追踪数据确认，frontend->recommendationservice 的调用延迟从 124ms 暴增至 58,666ms，且大量请求状态为 context canceled；同时，recommendationservice->productcatalogservice 的调用延迟从 2.9ms 暴增至 519,148ms，并伴有状态码 14 (UNAVAILABLE) 错误，这表明故障影响 recommendationservice 与 productcatalogservice 两个组件之间的通信
Step 4: 综合极端延迟、连接超时和特定服务对间的通信失败模式，推断根本原因源于 recommendationservice 与 productcatalogservice 之间的网络层，存在包损坏或数据位错误

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Sudden and extreme increase in values (e.g., orders of magnitude higher than baseline)
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 recommendationservice 和 productcatalogservice 的 rrt (请求响应时间) 和 rrt_max (最大请求响应时间) 指标是否在故障期间出现数量级的异常飙升

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Abnormal changes in network traffic volume, packet counts, or potential retransmission patterns
critical_checks.instruction: 检查涉及到的服务 Pod (特别是 recommendationservice 和 productcatalogservice) 的网络接收/发送字节数及包数量指标，是否存在异常模式，这可能指示包损坏导致的重传或流量异常
检查 frontend、recommendationservice 等服务的 error_ratio (错误率) 和 client_error_ratio (客户端错误率) 指标是否在故障期间显著上升

critical_checks.target: Rpc, error, code, canceled, desc, context canceled
critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log entries containing gRPC RPC errors with ‘context canceled’ descriptions
critical_checks.instruction: 在 frontend、recommendationservice 等服务的日志中搜索包含‘Rpc error’、‘code = Canceled’、‘desc = context canceled’等关键词的错误条目

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log entries indicating connection or request timeouts
critical_checks.instruction: 在相关服务（尤其是 recommendationservice）的日志中搜索包含‘timeout’关键词的连接或请求超时错误

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log entries containing ‘StatusCode.UNAVAILABLE’ or similar service unavailability errors
critical_checks.instruction: 在相关服务（尤其是 recommendationservice）的日志中搜索包含‘unavailable’或‘StatusCode.UNAVAILABLE’关键词的错误

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Extreme latency increase (e.g., hundreds or thousands of times normal) for calls between these service pairs, with error status codes (e.g., 1-Canceled, 2-Unknown, 14-UNAVAILABLE)
critical_checks.instruction: 分析追踪数据，重点关注 frontend 调用 recommendationservice 以及 recommendationservice 调用 productcatalogservice 的调用链，检查其平均持续时间和状态码是否出现极端延迟和大量失败
